fields.label: OCR Backend
fields.description: PaddleOCR gives better accuracy on ID cards but must be installed separately (pip install "visitor[paddleocr]") before selecting it here.

fields.label: OCR Confidence Threshold
fields.description: Visitors with OCR confidence below this value are surfaced on the OCR Exception Report.

fields.label: Block Exit Scan Without Matching Entry
fields.description: If unchecked, a badge scanned for exit with no open entry record is logged as an exception instead of being blocked.
